title: Booja - Booja, Almond Salted Caramel Two Vegan Chocolate Truffle Packs (Pack of 16)
features: 16 Packs of Irresistible Almond Salted Caramel Chocolate Truffles: A sumptuous collection of chewy, gooey chocolate swoons with roasted almonds and a touch of sea salt. Multi-award-winning and melt-in-the-mouth indulgent.
Luxury in Every Bite: Crafted for life’s little indulgences, these rich chocolate truffles offer the perfect Booja-Booja moment whenever the mood takes you.
Certified Organic & Free-From friendly: Free from dairy, gluten, and soya. Made with minimal, high-quality ingredients. Perfect for those who seek exquisite chocolate without compromise.
Vegan & Palm Oil-Free: Elegantly simple and consciously crafted to be enjoyed by all. Suitable for vegans, vegetarians, and coeliacs. No palm oil or artificial additives.
Made in Norfolk, England: Craft and packed with care at our Booja-Booja HQ to ensure exceptional quality and flavour in every pack.
description: Product Description Discover the joys of vegan chocolate Delicious multi award-winning* chocolate truffles and truffle loglets: handmade with the finest organic ingredients to create moments of melt-in-the-mouth delight. *We're certified by The Vegan Society 2023 and The Soil Association 2023. So far this year we've won 5 awards for our chocolate truffles, from The Great Taste Awards 2023, Free From Food Awards 2023 and Nourish Vegan Awards 2023. In total, we've won 174 awards (and counting) across our product range. A little more about us... Booja - Booja offers you delicious moments of beautifully sweet pleasure that help brighten the faces of friends and loved ones... and to occasionally quietly enjoy on your own. Using the minimal number of simple organic ingredients, we've been making delightful chocolate truffles in Norfolk since 1999. With many awards* for taste and quality, it's easy to see why we have quickly developed an enthusiastic following. All of our delicious products are dairy, gluten and soya free. They're also palm oil-free. Suitable for vegans, vegetarians and coeliacs. Two Truffle Pack Collection Scrumptious truffles featured in this collection... Hazelnut Crunch Melt in the mouth sweetly roasted hazelnut delights, coated in cocoa powder. Almond Salted Caramel Melt in the mouth, gooey sea salted caramel and roasted almonds swoons, coated in cocoa powder. Honeycomb Caramel A full scrunch of our special caramel honeycomb, coated in cocoa powder. Chocolate Orange Juicy little bursts of tangy mandarin surprises, coated in cocoa powder. Chocolate Salted Caramel Seas of salted chocolate caramel chewiness, coated in cocoa powder.
